sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO EZHRMASTER.TBLDEPTMASTER ( CN, DISPLAYNAME, DISPLAYNAME2, MAIL, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3, COMPNM2, DEPTLEVEL, DEPT_CD_PATH, ADSPATH, UPDATEDT, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #v_CN#, #v_DISPLAYNAME#, #v_DISPLAYNAME2#, #v_MAIL#, #v_PARENTCN#, #v_CN#, #v_DISPLAYNAME#, #v_DISPLAYNAME2#, 1,# v_CN#, #v_LDAPPATH#, to_date(#nowDate#, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI:SS'), #v_TENANT_ID# )

INSERT INTO EZHRMASTER.TBLDEPTMASTER (CN, DISPLAYNAME, DISPLAYNAME2, USEFLAG, MAIL, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, ADFLAG, ADSPATH, UPDATEDT, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #v_CN#, #v_DISPLAYNAME#, #v_DISPLAYNAME2#, 'Y', #v_MAIL#, #v_PARENTCN#, #v_EXTATTR4#, #v_EXTATTR5#, #v_EXTATTR6#, #v_EXTATTR8#, #v_EXTATTR9#, #v_EXTATTR10#, #v_EXTATTR15#, 'Y', #v_LDAPPATH#, #nowDate#, #v_TENANT_ID# )
sqlMap.statement: MERGE INTO EZHRMASTER.TBLDEPTMASTER USING ( SELECT EZHRMASTER.TBLDEPTMASTER.ROWID ROW_ID, B.COMPNM2, B.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2, B.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3, B.Dept_CD_Path || ',' || EZHRMASTER.TBLDEPTMASTER.CN AS pos_5 FROM EZHRMASTER.TBLDEPTMASTER , ( SELECT B.* FROM EZHRMASTER.TBLDEPTMASTER A JOIN EZHRMASTER.TBLDEPTMASTER B ON B.CN = A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.CN = #v_CN# AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND B.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ) B WHERE EZHRMASTER.TBLDEPTMASTER.CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ) src ON ( EZHRMASTER.TBLDEPTMASTER.ROWID = src.row_id ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET EZHRMASTER.TBLDEPTMASTER.COMPNM2 = src.CompNm2, EZHRMASTER.TBLDEPTMASTER.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = src.extensionAttribute2, EZHRMASTER.TBLDEPTMASTER.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 = src.extensionAttribute3, EZHRMASTER.TBLDEPTMASTER.DEPT_CD_PATH = pos_5
sqlMap.select: SELECT A.CN , A.DISPLAYNAME , A.DISPLAYNAME2 FROM ( SELECT CN, CASE #lang# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME, CASE #lang# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE DISPLAYNAME END DISPLAYNAME2 FROM EZHRMASTER.TBLDeptmaster WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND DEPTLEVEL = 1 OR CN = 'Top' ) A ORDER BY A.CN

SELECT CN , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DESCRIPTION ELSE DESCRIPTION2 END DESCRIPTION , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN TITLE ELSE TITLE2 END TITLE , mail , TelephoneNumber , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN COMPANY ELSE COMPANY2 END COMPANY , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 FROM EZHRMASTER.TBLUSERMASTER WHERE NULLIF(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4, null) IS NOT NULL AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #v_COMPANYID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ORDER BY DISPLAYNAME
SELECT * FROM EZHRMASTER.TBLPROXYINFO WHERE USERID = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#

SELECT A.CN , A.DEPTID , A.POSITIONCD , CASE '1' WHEN '1' THEN A.TITLE ELSE A.TITLE2 END TITLE , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN C.DISPLAYNAME ELSE C.DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN B.DISPLAYNAME ELSE B.DISPLAYNAME2 END DESCRIPTION , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN B.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 ELSE B.COMPNM2 END COMPANYNAME , A.TITLE T1 , A.TITLE2 T2 FROM EZHRMASTER.TBLADDJOBMASTER A JOIN EZHRMASTER.TBLDEPTMASTER B ON A.DEPTID = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID JOIN EZHRMASTER.TBLUSERMASTER C ON A.CN = C.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID WHERE A.CN = #v_CN# AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND B.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ORDER BY B.DISPLAYNAME

SELECT COUNT(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 ) FROM EZHRMASTER.TBLUSERMASTER WHERE NULLIF(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, NULL) IS NOT NULL AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #v_COMPANYID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 LIKE '%$v_TYPE$%'

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT CN, CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END AS DISPLAYNAME, CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DESCRIPTION ELSE DESCRIPTION2 END AS DESCRIPTION, CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN TITLE ELSE TITLE2 END AS TITLE, MAIL, TELEPHONENUMBER, CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN COMPANY ELSE COMPANY2 END AS COMPANY, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY DISPLAYNAME) AS ROWNUM_ FROM EZHRMASTER.TBLUSERMASTER WHERE NULLIF(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, NULL) IS NOT NULL AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #v_COMPANYID# AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 LIKE '%$v_TYPE$%' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ) A WHERE ROWNUM_ BETWEEN #v_PSTARTROW# AND #v_PENDROW#
SELECT COUNT(CN)TOTALCNT FROM EZHRMASTER.TBLUSERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#

SELECT CN , DISPLAYNAME , DISPLAYNAME2 , DESCRIPTION , DESCRIPTION2 , TITLE , TITLE2 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE102 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14 , REPLACE(SUBSTR(UpdateDT,1,10),'.','') UPDATEDT FROM EZHRMASTER.TBLUSERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE CN NOT IN ( SELECT CN FROM EZHRMASTER.TBLUSERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE ROWNUM <= #v_ROWPERPAGE# * (#v_PAGE# - 1) ) AND ROWNUM <= #v_ROWPERPAGE# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT CN FROM EZHRMASTER.TBLUSERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# )
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO EZHRMASTER.TBLUSERMASTER ( CN, DisplayName, DisplayName2, mail, MAILNICKNAME, UPNNAME, Department, Description, Description2, Description3, PhysicalDeliveryOfficeName, Company, Company2, Title, Title2, TelephoneNumber, HomePhone, FACSIMILETELEPHONENUMBER, Mobile, postalcode, streetaddress, info, extensionAttribute1, extensionAttribute2, extensionAttribute3, extensionAttribute4, extensionAttribute5, extensionAttribute6, extensionAttribute7, extensionAttribute8, extensionAttribute9, extensionAttribute10, extensionAttribute102, extensionAttribute11, extensionAttribute12, extensionAttribute13, extensionAttribute14, extensionAttribute15, ADSPath, UpdateDT, Mobile_Enable, Mobile_NotUse, Mobile_PIN, SIPURI ,PASSWORD, TENANT_ID ) ( SELECT CN , DISPLAYNAME , DISPLAYNAME2 , MAIL , MAILNICKNAME , UPNNAME , DEPARTMENT , DESCRIPTION , DESCRIPTION2 , DESCRIPTION3 , PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME , COMPANY , COMPANY2 , TITLE , TITLE2 , TELEPHONENUMBER , HOMEPHONE , FACSIMILETELEPHONENUMBER , MOBILE , POSTALCODE , STREETADDRESS , INFO , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE102 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE11 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE12 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE13 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , ADSPATH , to_date(#nowDate#, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI:SS') AS UPDATEDT, MOBILE_ENABLE , MOBILE_NOTUSE , MOBILE_PIN , SIPURI, PASSWORD, TENANT_ID FROM EZHRMASTER.TBLUSERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE CN = #v_CN# )
sqlMap.delete: DELETE EZHRMASTER.TBLUSERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
sqlMap.statement: MERGE INTO EZHRMASTER.TBLUSERMASTER USING ( SELECT TBLUSERMASTER.ROWID ROW_ID, TBLDEPTMASTER.DISPLAYNAME, TBLDEPTMASTER.DISPLAYNAME2, TBLDEPTMASTER.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3, TBLDEPTMASTER.COMPNM2, TBLDEPTMASTER.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM EZHRMASTER.TBLUSERMASTER JOIN EZHRMASTER.TBLDEPTMASTER ON TBLUSERMASTER.DEPARTMENT = TBLDEPTMASTER.CN AND TBLUSERMASTER.TENANT_ID = TBLDEPTMASTER.TENANT_ID WHERE TBLUSERMASTER.CN = #v_CN# AND TBLUSERMASTER.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ) src ON ( TBLUSERMASTER.ROWID = src.row_id ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET TBLUSERMASTER.DESCRIPTION = src.DisplayName, TBLUSERMASTER.DESCRIPTION2 = src.DisplayName2, TBLUSERMASTER.COMPANY = src.extensionAttribute3, TBLUSERMASTER.COMPANY2 = src.CompNm2, TBLUSERMASTER.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = src.extensionAttribute2
sqlMap.select: SELECT NVL(DISPLAYNAME2, ' ') , NVL(TITLE2, ' ') , NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE102, ' ') FROM EZHRMASTER.TBLUSERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
sqlMap.update:
UPDATE EZHRMASTER.TBLUSERMASTER
SET DISPLAYNAME2 = #displayName#
SET TITLE2 = #title#
SET EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE102 = #extensionAttribute10#
WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT CN , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , DISPLAYNAME DISPLAYNAME1 , DISPLAYNAME2 , MAIL , MAILNICKNAME , DEPARTMENT , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DESCRIPTION ELSE DESCRIPTION2 END DESCRIPTION , DESCRIPTION DESCRIPTION1 , DESCRIPTION2 , PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN COMPANY ELSE COMPANY2 END COMPANY , COMPANY COMPANY1 , COMPANY2 , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN TITLE ELSE TITLE2 END TITLE , TITLE TITLE1 , TITLE2 TITLE2 , TELEPHONENUMBER , HOMEPHONE , FACSIMILETELEPHONENUMBER , MOBILE , STREETADDRESS , POSTALCODE , INFO , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 ELSE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE102 END EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE101 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE102 EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE102 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE11 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE12 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE13 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , ADSPATH , UPDATEDT , 'user' TYPE , ' ' DISPLAYNAMEPRINTABLE FROM EZHRMASTER.TBLUSERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
SELECT a.cn FROM ezHrmaster.TBLUSERMASTER a INNER JOIN ezHrmaster.TBLDEPTMASTER b ON a.department=b.cn AND a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id ORDER BY cn
SELECT COUNT(cn) FROM ( SELECT cn FROM ezHrmaster.TBLUSERMASTER AND tenant_id = #v_TENANT_ID# UNION SELECT cn FROM ezHrmaster.TBLDEPTMASTER AND tenant_id = #tenantID# ) WHERE cn = #cn#
SELECT COUNT(cn) FROM ezHrmaster.TBLDEPTMASTER WHERE extensionattribute1 = #cn# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#

SELECT COUNT(cn) FROM ( SELECT cn FROM ezHrmaster.TBLUSERMASTER AND tenant_id = #tenantID# UNION SELECT cn FROM ezHrmaster.TBLDEPTMASTER AND tenant_id = #tenantID# UNION SELECT cn FROM ezHrmaster.TBLUSERMASTER_RETIRE AND tenant_id = #tenantID# ) WHERE cn = #cn#
SELECT COUNT(cn) FROM ezHrmaster.TBLUSERMASTER WHERE department = #cn# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
sqlMap.update:
UPDATE ezHrmaster.TBLDEPTMASTER SET updatedt = to_date(#nowDate#, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI:SS')
displayName = #displayName# displayName2 = #displayName2# mail = #mail# extensionattribute1 = #extensionAttribute1# extensionattribute2 = #extensionAttribute2# extensionattribute3 = #extensionAttribute3# extensionattribute4 = #extensionAttribute4# extensionattribute5 = #extensionAttribute5# extensionattribute6 = #extensionAttribute6# extensionattribute7 = #extensionAttribute7# extensionattribute8 = #extensionAttribute8# extensionattribute9 = #extensionAttribute9# extensionattribute10 = #extensionAttribute10# extensionattribute11 = #extensionAttribute11# extensionattribute12 = #extensionAttribute12# extensionattribute13 = #extensionAttribute13# extensionattribute14 = #extensionAttribute14# extensionattribute15 = #extensionAttribute15#
WHERE cn = #cn# AND tenant_id = #tenantId#

UPDATE ezHrmaster.TBLUSERMASTER SET updatedt = to_date(#nowDate#, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI:SS')
displayName = #displayName# displayName2 = #displayName2# title= #title# title2 = #title2# extensionAttribute15 = #extensionAttribute15# extensionAttribute6 = #extensionAttribute6# extensionAttribute14 = #extensionAttribute14# extensionAttribute10 = #extensionAttribute10# extensionAttribute1 = #extensionAttribute1# extensionAttribute2 = #extensionAttribute2# extensionAttribute3 = #extensionAttribute3# extensionAttribute102 = #extensionAttribute102# telephoneNumber = #telephoneNumber# homePhone = #homePhone# facsimileTelephoneNumber = #facsimileTelephoneNumber# mobile = #mobile# postalCode = #postalCode# streetAddress = #streetAddress# birthType = #birthType# birth = #birth# info = #info#
WHERE cn = #cn# AND tenant_id = #tenantId#
UPDATE ezHrmaster.TBLUSERMASTER SET mail = #MAIL# WHERE cn = #CN# AND tenant_id = #TENANT_ID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE ezHrmaster.TBLADDJOBMASTER WHERE cn = #v_CN# AND deptid = #v_DEPTID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
